title: Result - Switzerland
content:
Welcome to Switzerland, a gem in the heart of Europe. Despite its compact size of 41,000 square kilometres, it boasts breathtaking diversity, from palm trees in the south to alpine glaciers. With 4 distinct language regions, Switzerland is a cultural melting pot, blending German, French and Italian influences.
Renowned for innovation, its economy thrives on banking, tourism and industries like machinery and pharmaceuticals. Explore 62,000 kilometres of hiking trails, swim in the Aare River in Bern, or try bungee jumping off the Contra Dam. And, of course, don’t miss indulging in Switzerland’s famous chocolate and cheese!

## Unique food tradition
Fondue: a dish where bread or fruit are dipped into melted cheese or chocolate
The service sector industries are dominant in Switzerland’s economy with insurance, banking, trade and commerce, as well as tourism leading the way.

### Local legend or myth
William Tell: said to have been an expert marksman who shot an apple off his son’s head to defy an oppressive ruler.

### Language of the Land
Switzerland has 4 official languages: German, French, Italian and Romansh, with German being the most widely spoken among them.
main modes of travel—trains, buses and boats—form the backbone of Switzerland's high-quality public transportation system.
